description_long: This nightstand features a classic rectangular top with a single, centrally positioned drawer adorned with a curved bar pull handle. The front panel of the drawer is decorated with subtle carved detailing, adding an elegant touch to the otherwise simple design. The legs are gently curved, providing a sense of refinement and stability, and they extend downward from the corners of the nightstand. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel being completely flat and unadorned. The overall finish appears smooth and uniform, with a monochromatic light color that enhances its traditional aesthetic. This piece is likely constructed from wood, making it both sturdy and suitable for supporting small objects on its surface.
description: A classic, light-colored nightstand with a single drawer, curved legs, and subtle carved detailing on the front. The design is elegant and traditional, with a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative drawer with a curved bar pull handle and carved detailing, as well as the curved legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain, smooth side panel and the profile of the curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, undecorated back panel and the symmetrical leg design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and curved leg profile.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
